$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for workflow actions. Add actions here; code in action-handlers.js interprets them.

_documentation.description: Central registry of all workflow actions referenced by metadata hooks.

types.create_entity: Create a new entity record from context

patterns.copyFields: Array of field names to copy from source record
patterns.mapping: Object mapping source field → target field name
patterns.setFields: Object with static values or { field: 'fieldName' } references
